title: microseris obtusata
intro: Microseris obtusata, also known as the small-flower tarweed, is a flowering plant native to the western United States and Canada. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including arthritis and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Microseris obtusata can be prepared as a tea or tincture, or used topically in the form of a salve or ointment, to take advantage of its medicinal benefits.
